title: Mouse-HandTracking
subtitle: Hands-free mouse control via webcam hand tracking
summary: Real-time hand-gesture mouse control via webcam. Cursor movement, clicks, and scroll are mapped to hand landmarks. Features a system tray app with Windows startup Registry integration and a one-click installer with live camera preview UI.

title: Perfect Circle
subtitle: Browser game — how close to perfect can you draw?
summary: Browser game that scores freehand circle accuracy (0–100%) using centroid-distance standard deviation analysis. Features role-based login (admin/user), sessionStorage auth, persistent localStorage leaderboard, and an admin dashboard with Chart.js score statistics.

title: KampYeri
subtitle: Full-stack campsite & hotel reservation platform
summary: Full-stack reservation platform for campsites, hotels, and caravan areas with a dynamic business management system. Built with ASP.NET & LINQ on the backend, Bootstrap frontend, and a standalone admin panel for a separate existing web application.

title: Mobile App Analysis
subtitle: Data analysis on 1500+ apps from Google Play & App Store
summary: End-to-end data analysis on a 1,500+ app dataset scraped from Google Play and Apple App Store. Covers EDA, missing-value imputation, outlier detection via IQR & Z-Score. Includes 10 GroupBy queries and 10 visualization types (histplot, heatmap, pairplot, violinplot).

title: Font-Specific OCR
subtitle: Lightweight CNN-based character recognition system
summary: Lightweight OCR targeting specific fonts (Times New Roman, Arial, Georgia) instead of a heavy general-purpose engine. Pipeline: OpenCV preprocessing segments characters via contour detection, a MobileNetV3-small CNN classifies each crop, then text is reconstructed. Trained on a 50–100K synthetic dataset.
